summary: Russian forces have destroyed enemy unmanned boats using FPV drones near Tendrovskaya Spit and the Dnieper delta. Ukrainian forces are deploying AI-powered loitering munitions like the European HX-2, with Ukraine offering partners access to combat data for AI training. Russian systems such as "Elka" and "Yolka" anti-aircraft drones are conducting kinetic intercepts of Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs, while the "Rubicon" Center reports over 20,000 enemy target destructions, with 35.4% being unmanned systems. On the tactical side, Ukrainian FPV pilots are experimenting with disorienting maneuvers before strikes, and Russian infantry have been recorded engaging FPV drones directly, with mixed results.
